title: anthemis tinctoria subsp. parnassica
intro: Anthemis tinctoria subsp. parnassica, also known as Mountain Chamomile, is a subspecies of the Anthemis tinctoria plant, a flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally used for its medicinal properties, Mountain Chamomile has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in soothing skin irritations and wounds. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and aiding in the treatment of insomnia and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Mountain Chamomile include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
